name: quillshield-security-skills
description: QuillShield smart contract security auditing skills for AI agents. Comprehensive coverage of OWASP Smart Contract Top 10 plus proxy/upgrade, signature replay, and token integration vulnerabilities. Includes Behavioral State Analysis (BSA), Semantic Guard Analysis, State Invariant Detection, Reentrancy Pattern Analysis, Oracle & Flash Loan Analysis, Proxy & Upgrade Safety, Input & Arithmetic Safety, External Call Safety, Signature & Replay Analysis, and DoS & Griefing Analysis.
